news.title:
V-Guard Industries approves ₹25.0 Cr investment in Gegadyne Energy Labs, raising stake to 30.35%.
Gegadyne specializes in alternate battery tech; acquisition aims to leverage tech for energy storage and V-Guard products.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries approves ₹25.0 Cr investment in Gegadyne Energy Labs, raising stake to 30.35%.
Gegadyne specializes in alternate battery tech; acquisition aims to leverage tech for energy storage and V-Guard products.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries faces GST audit objection for excess ITC from FY21 to FY24.
Demand of ₹177.6 crore plus interest and penalty; company evaluating response.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries faces GST audit objection for excess ITC from FY21 to FY24.
Demand of ₹177.6 crore plus interest and penalty; company evaluating response.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries conducted an earnings call on Jan 29, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website for investor reference.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries conducted an earnings call on Jan 29, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website for investor reference.

news.title:
V-Guard's Q3 earnings were soft, with profits missing estimates.
The weakness in performance impacted the company's overall quarterly results.
news.summary:
V-Guard's Q3 earnings were soft, with profits missing estimates.
The weakness in performance impacted the company's overall quarterly results.

news.title: V-Guard Industries reports Q3 revenue of 14B rupees, up 10.4% YoY.
news.summary: V-Guard Industries reports Q3 revenue of 14B rupees, up 10.4% YoY.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries' board to meet on Jan 28, 2026, to review and approve Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window for securities remains closed till 48 hours post results announcement, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries' board to meet on Jan 28, 2026, to review and approve Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window for securities remains closed till 48 hours post results announcement, per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~1.5M shares at Rs. 339.65.
The total transaction value of the trade amounted to Rs. 50.98 crores.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~1.5M shares at Rs. 339.65.
The total transaction value of the trade amounted to Rs. 50.98 crores.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries Ltd's ₹150 crore commercial paper reaffirmed with CRISIL A1+ rating.
CRISIL reaffirmation disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30; compliance officer confirms details.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries Ltd's ₹150 crore commercial paper reaffirmed with CRISIL A1+ rating.
CRISIL reaffirmation disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30; compliance officer confirms details.

news.title:
V-Guard enters India's crowded lighting market, focusing on luminaires to complement its transformation into a national electricals brand.
FY25 revenue grew 14.8% YoY to ₹5,578 crore; lighting aims to leverage existing networks, targeting 15% annual growth over 5 years.
news.summary:
V-Guard enters India's crowded lighting market, focusing on luminaires to complement its transformation into a national electricals brand.
FY25 revenue grew 14.8% YoY to ₹5,578 crore; lighting aims to leverage existing networks, targeting 15% annual growth over 5 years.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries plans to attend Anand Rathi's G200 Summit on Nov 14, 2025.
The group meeting is scheduled from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries plans to attend Anand Rathi's G200 Summit on Nov 14, 2025.
The group meeting is scheduled from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries reported Q2 FY26 revenue of INR1,340 crores, up 3.6% YoY, with Electronics segment growth at 5.3%.
EBITDA margin declined to 8.1%, but gross margin improved to 37.6%. Sunflame integration expected to unlock efficiencies.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries reported Q2 FY26 revenue of INR1,340 crores, up 3.6% YoY, with Electronics segment growth at 5.3%.
EBITDA margin declined to 8.1%, but gross margin improved to 37.6%. Sunflame integration expected to unlock efficiencies.

news.title:
HDFC Securities gives 'Reduce' for Hyundai, Bandhan & V-Guard; 'Add' for Canara, AB Capital & SAIL.
Hyundai's EBITDA margin at 13.9%, Canara Bank Q2 FY26 earnings beat estimates with stable margins.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities gives 'Reduce' for Hyundai, Bandhan & V-Guard; 'Add' for Canara, AB Capital & SAIL.
Hyundai's EBITDA margin at 13.9%, Canara Bank Q2 FY26 earnings beat estimates with stable margins.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries reports declining financial metrics for Sep 2025, including lower ROCE and PAT.
Despite stock underperformance vs Sensex, V-Guard shows resilience over longer investment horizons.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries reports declining financial metrics for Sep 2025, including lower ROCE and PAT.
Despite stock underperformance vs Sensex, V-Guard shows resilience over longer investment horizons.

news.title:
V-Guard targets mid-teen growth via Sunflame synergy, North India expansion, and premium product optimization.
Margin expansion expected in FY26-27 through cost control and manufacturing efficiency improvements.
news.summary:
V-Guard targets mid-teen growth via Sunflame synergy, North India expansion, and premium product optimization.
Margin expansion expected in FY26-27 through cost control and manufacturing efficiency improvements.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries reports withdrawal of a 207M INR tax demand.
The move potentially eases financial obligations for the company.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries reports withdrawal of a 207M INR tax demand.
The move potentially eases financial obligations for the company.

news.title:
Gangtok Central GST drops Rs. 207 crore demand for V-Guard Industries.
Demand covered FY 2017-18 to FY 2024-25; no penalties identified.
news.summary:
Gangtok Central GST drops Rs. 207 crore demand for V-Guard Industries.
Demand covered FY 2017-18 to FY 2024-25; no penalties identified.

news.title:
V-Guard Q2 profit rises 4% YoY to ₹65 Cr; revenue grows 3.6% to ₹1,341 Cr.
Management expects GST 2.0 reforms to revive demand; shares up 1% at ₹381.50 on NSE.
news.summary:
V-Guard Q2 profit rises 4% YoY to ₹65 Cr; revenue grows 3.6% to ₹1,341 Cr.
Management expects GST 2.0 reforms to revive demand; shares up 1% at ₹381.50 on NSE.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries Q2 EBITDA at ₹1.09B, down from ₹1.1B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 8.15% from 8.52% YoY.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries Q2 EBITDA at ₹1.09B, down from ₹1.1B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 8.15% from 8.52% YoY.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries Ltd. approved unaudited Q2 FY26 financial results, showing consolidated revenue of ₹2,807 crore and profit of ₹139.1 crore.
The board allotted 3,45,853 equity shares under ESOS 2013 and approved merger plans for Sunflame Enterprises Pvt. Ltd. into V-Guard.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries Ltd. approved unaudited Q2 FY26 financial results, showing consolidated revenue of ₹2,807 crore and profit of ₹139.1 crore.
The board allotted 3,45,853 equity shares under ESOS 2013 and approved merger plans for Sunflame Enterprises Pvt. Ltd. into V-Guard.

news.title:
V-Guard Industries schedules board meeting on Oct 29, 2025, to review and approve Q2 and H1 FY25 results.
Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post results disclosure, complying with SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
V-Guard Industries schedules board meeting on Oct 29, 2025, to review and approve Q2 and H1 FY25 results.
Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post results disclosure, complying with SEBI regulations.
